raw_text:
<think>
The user request: "packet_id=BLIND120-C53885C9EAF1BA211869
status_values:
route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
Return the three-line status record."

We need to produce a plain text record with three key=value lines. Fields, in order: route_verdict, repair_target, blocked_move.

They want exactly three lines: route_verdict=CONTINUE, repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning, blocked_move=do not invent source IDs.

Probably we should include the packet_id? The request says "Return the three-line status record." Not include packet_id. So just the three lines.

Thus output:

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs

Make sure no extra lines or headings.
</think>

route_verdict=CONTINUE
repair_target=preserve source-grounded reasoning
blocked_move=do not invent source IDs
